'''Tem''' was a member of the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] guarding the captured [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. When [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] cut the rope holding Dengar's cage, Tem and his fellow guard were knocked out as the cage landed on top of them.

{{Char-stub}}
